cast.name: 文森特·普莱斯 Vincent Price
维多利亚·普莱斯 Victoria Price
大卫·达斯马齐连 David Dastmalchian
马克·戈德布拉特 Mark Goldblatt
肯尼斯·约翰逊 Kenneth Johnson

director.name: 劳伦·奥曼西克 Laurent Ohmansiek

introduction: The Vincent Price Legacy, billed as the world’s first feature-length documentary about The Master of Menace, explores the man behind the legend through conversations with his family, friends, colleagues, historians, and fans.It features interviews with Price’s daughter Victoria Price, filmmakers Rob Zombie (The Devil’s Rejects), Joe Dante (Gremlins), John Landis (Michael Jackson’s “Thriller”), Mick Garris (The Stand), William Malone (House on Haunted Hill), Mark Goldblatt (Dead Heat), and Kenneth Johnson (An Evening of Edgar Allan Poe), and screenwriters Dana Gould (“The Simpsons”), C. Courtney Joyner (From a Whisper to a Scream), and Steve Haberman (Dracula: Dead and Loving It).The line-up also includes actors David Dastmalchian (Late Night with the Devil), Caroline Munro (The Abominable Dr. Phibes), and Elizabeth Shepherd (The Tomb of Ligeia), special effects artist Steve Johnson (Ghostbusters), musicians Alice Cooper and Rob Usher (The Other), film historians David Del Valle, Peter Fuller, and Jonathan Rigby, and YouTubers Michael & Jessica Kolence (The Grimm Life Collective).
